text_block_list.text:
A few days after Fuji Kiseki saved me by finding my badge, I see her
speaking with a younger student near the school gates.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I see. So that's what is troubling you.

text_block_list.name: Junior Student A
text_block_list.text:
Right... I've always wanted to be like my sister and race in the Twinkle
Series, but there's no way with my run record.

text_block_list.name: Junior Student A
text_block_list.text:
You know, when she was my age, she was already race-ready. I just
don't have any talent, huh...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hm...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"Alas, the sword is heavy in hand, and the path of thorns cuts deep. I
fear I cannot go on."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"The valiant heroes who saved the people once held firm their swords
of deliverance, and cut a path forward through this hill of piercing
thorns."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"But I... I cannot. And I could never. Such burden, such pain... I, who
cannot bear it, have not the right to be called a hero."

text_block_list.name: Junior Student A
text_block_list.text: Uh, Fuji?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Overcome with despair, she falls to the ground. But then a girl
appears who had been watching over her since childhood.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The girl speaks to the woebegone hero. "So long as you do not let
go, the right to be a hero will ever be in your hands."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"Never forget, your will is yours forever. You needn't hold a sword,
nor run through ripping thorns. You will always have your own path to
follow."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The hero then casts her sword and armor aside, and with naught but
her own self, she ascends the hill of thorns. With her honed fist, she
vanquishes the evil and saves the kingdom.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Trust in all your years of training, and believe in your own will...
Okay?

text_block_list.name: Junior Student A
text_block_list.text: My training and my will...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Blame not your differences with your sister. Instead, try to look
within.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: There is a path out there—one which can be traversed by you alone!

text_block_list.name: Junior Student A
text_block_list.text: Fuji!

Overcome with emotion, the young runner begins to cry, but finds
comfort in Fuji Kiseki's kind touch. Finally, she departs with a look of
relief on her face.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh? Could it be? The trainer from before!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
So you saw all that. I'd like to keep private matters private. You
mustn't tell anyone.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You really think she feels better? Well, if a passing trainer thinks so, I
suppose it must be true.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I know it's hard to keep a smile on your face all the time... But I want
to at least make the little ones happy when I'm around.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
My own words lack the same poignancy, so I quoted something from
when I saw my mother onstage.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I'll be glad if it lightened the weight on her heart, even if only a little.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: That she is! And quite a famous one in those circles.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Her performances are nothing short of legendary! When she appears
onstage, one mere utterance rivets the entire audience.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And at each play's end, the theater rumbles with thunderous
applause! You can imagine the joy on each person's face!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: My mother is the greatest entertainer I've ever known!
choice_data_list:
And so you want to bring that same joy to
others now.

And so you want to bring that same joy to
others now.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Correct you are. Admiring my mother onstage was the start of it. I
even thought to follow in her footsteps onto the big stage at first.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But as you can see... it wasn't meant to be. I was heartbroken, facing
the chasm between who I wanted to be... and reality.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That's when my mother quoted those lines to me. And she said,
"There's more than one path. Learn to expand your horizons."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
So after searching and searching for a new path to follow, I finally
found it... racing.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: When I first set foot on the turf, I...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's right. It's come time for me to race in a scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: If it pleases you, you must come to watch me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Obviously, I go to see Fuji Kiseki's race. There, I become truly
captivated...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Haah!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
S-such beautiful running! Look at that polished form, that elegant
movement... I'm totally enchanted!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: And the way she accelerates is amazing! Just how fast can she go?! This is so exciting!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I'll put on a miracle of a performance that will make everyone smile!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: For I... am the miracle of the turf, Fuji Kiseki!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: YEEEAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've never heard such a surge of applause at a scrimmage! This shows
how captivating she really is!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki, that was an incredible race! I would love to talk to you
about becoming your trainer!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: That goes for me too!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, hearing such words brings me great joy! But you must forgive
me. Unfortunately, I'm not accepting any offers at this time.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
First, you see, I must prove to every trainer at the tryouts that I have
what it takes.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
So you would like to give everyone a fair shot at seeing what kind of
racer you really are... All right, I'll look forward to it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Thank you, one and all!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
So long as there are people hoping for a miraculous race, it is this
entertainer's mission to give them a show to remember.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I invite you to enjoy the tryouts to your heart's content!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki's remarks have a dignity and strength that convey her
readiness for anything that comes.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: No matter the stage, I shall entertain one and all.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Yes, no matter the stage...
